name: Mock-Chiffon Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------Chocolate Cream------------------------------
1. Combine 1 cup Whipping cream, 1/4 cup C & H Powdered Sugar, and 1/4 cup Chocolate Quick in a bowl. Beat until stiff.
[NOTE: Chocolate Quick is a brand of chocolate milk mix made by Nestle's]
2. In a large bowl, beat egg whites until foamy. Gradually beat in 1/2 cup sugar until very stiff. Set aside.
3. In another bowl, combine remaining sugar, flour, baking powder, soda, and salt. Mix well.
4. Add the oil and half the milk to the flour mixture. Beat for one minute.
5. Add the remaining milk and egg yolks to the batter. Beat for one minute.
6. Stir in the melted chocolate.
7. Fold the beaten egg whites into the chocolate batter.
8. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 13 x 9-inch pan.
9. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 40 minutes.
10. Cool, cut into squares, and serve with Chocolate Cream.
Reprinted with permission from Just Cakes
From the C & H Sugar Kitchen
Electronic format by Karen Mintzias
